Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Dark Space]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 5''' — An archaeological dig was reported on the border of Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — The Iron Legion was reduced to splinters and scattered across Dark Space after the death of the previous Iron King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 22''' — Dark Space is a location where the Iron Legion belongs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 28''' — The Iron Legion's life-supporting planets are scattered throughout Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The ship is at the border of Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — The map shows the ship's location relative to the edge of Dark Space.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — Dark Space is a long stretch of space located after the Kallver System.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Dark Space is a place where one could potentially land and hide.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 2''' — Dark Space is a location where the D’Niss swarms have headed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Dark Space is a location where entities might get hungry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — There is a sector on the edge of Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Dark Space is a location from which Sel’miroth may have returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 19''' — The D’Niss incursion is occurring on the edge of Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 33''' — The D’Niss incursion is treated as coming from Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Esh’kinaar lurks in Dark Space.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Dark Space contains billions of planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Dark Space borders the Galactic Union.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
